Tests for battery UI FSM, display calibration prompt, normal system app state machine, and build script.


## Files
- **[test_battery_ui_fsm.c](test_battery_ui_fsm.c.md)**: Tests for the battery UI finite state machine in the Pebble firmware, including state transitions and handling of charging, warnings, and shutdown scenarios.
- **[test_display_calibration_prompt.c](test_display_calibration_prompt.c.md)**: Tests for the display calibration prompt functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_normal_system_app_state_machine.c](test_normal_system_app_state_machine.c.md)**: Tests for the normal system app state machine in the Pebble firmware, including stub functions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing firmware components with specific source and test files.
